index.title: ServerMonitor Dashboard
index.selectServer: Select a server to view metrics
index.selectServerUpdates: Select a server to view update status
cp.title: Agent Control Panel
cp.globalControlDesc: Master switch to enable or disable all ServerMonitor agents
cp.agentsEnabledHint: When disabled, agents cannot start. Running agents will continue until stopped.
cp.quickActionsDesc: Common operations for managing all agents at once
cp.stopAllDesc: Gracefully shut down all running agents
cp.startAllDesc: Start agents on all servers via tray apps
cp.updateAllDesc: Install latest version on all servers
cp.triggerFilesDesc: Active trigger files that affect agent behavior
cp.configFolderDesc: Open the ServerMonitor config folder on fkxtst
cp.createStopFileDesc: Manually create a stop trigger file
tools.title: Tools
tools.configEditorsDesc: Edit agent configuration files with form-based UI
tools.agentAlertSettingsDesc: Edit channels, throttling, export settings, and performance scaling
tools.notificationSettingsDesc: Edit recipients, schedules, environments, and channel overrides
tools.dashboardSettingsDesc: Configure dashboard service and alert polling settings
tools.analysisOverviewDesc: View consolidated information about alert routing
tools.alertRoutingDesc: View which channels are enabled per environment with detailed reasons
tools.scriptRunnerDesc: Execute predefined scripts on remote servers
log.title: Log File
snapshot.title: Snapshot History Analysis
snapshot.noReport: Select a server and date range, then click Generate Report.
snapshot.saveJsonTitle: Save the analysis report as a JSON file
snapshot.saveHtmlTitle: Save the full report as a standalone HTML file
db2.title: DB2 Database Details
iis.title: IIS Web Server Details
alertSettings.title: Agent Alert Settings
alertSettings.channelConfigDesc: Configure how alerts are delivered. Each channel can be enabled/disabled and configured independently.
alertSettings.throttlingDesc: Configure rate limiting and deduplication to prevent alert storms.
alertSettings.globalSuppressionsHelp: Select channels to suppress globally for all alerts. Per-monitor suppressions are configured in Surveillance section.
alertSettings.snapshotExportDesc: Configure how monitoring snapshots are exported and retained.
alertSettings.maxFileCountHelp: Keep only N most recent files
alertSettings.perfScalingDesc: Configure reduced monitoring intensity for low-capacity servers.
alertSettings.lowCapacityPatternHelp: Regex pattern to match server names (e.g., -app$ for servers ending with -app)
alertSettings.intervalMultiplierHelp: Multiply all polling intervals by this factor
alertSettings.startupDelayMultiplierHelp: Multiply startup delays by this factor
dialog.saveConfirm: Are you sure you want to save these changes?
dialog.saveBackup: A backup will be created automatically before saving.
dialog.saveSync: Changes will be synced to all agents within 15 minutes.
dialog.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
routing.title: Alert Routing Overview
routing.perMonitorDesc: These monitors have specific channels suppressed in their SuppressedChannels setting.
notif.title: Notification Settings
notif.envConfigDesc: Define environments and their alert channel settings. Servers are matched by name patterns.
notif.recipientsDesc: Configure who receives alerts and when, based on environment and schedule.
dashSettings.title: Dashboard Settings
script.title: Script Runner
script.noExecutionsDesc: Select servers and run a script to see results here.
script.confirmDesc: You are about to execute the following:
script.confirmWarning: Scripts will be executed on all listed servers. This action cannot be undone.
controlPanel.title: Control Panel
controlPanel.agentControlDesc: Enable or disable the monitoring agent
controlPanel.agentsHint: When disabled, monitoring continues but no alerts are sent.
controlPanel.remoteActionsDesc: Trigger actions on the remote agent
controlPanel.reinstallAgentDesc: Creates trigger file to reinstall agent on next check
controlPanel.stopTrayIconDesc: Creates trigger file to stop the tray icon process
alertView.title: Alert Details
toolsPage.title: Tools
toolsPage.configEditorsDesc: Edit agent settings and alert configurations
toolsPage.alertRoutingDesc: Configure which alerts go to email, SMS, or Teams
toolsPage.alertSettingsDesc: Configure thresholds, severities, and alert behavior
toolsPage.notificationSettingsDesc: Configure SMS, email recipients, and Teams webhooks
toolsPage.dashboardSettingsDesc: Configure dashboard service, alert polling, and authentication
toolsPage.accessManagementDesc: Manage user access and view login history
toolsPage.userAccessLogsDesc: View allowed/blocked users/groups and recent login attempts
